description: Dreamlink-specific error patterns and their fixes

patterns.description: Import statement references unused or non-existent symbol
patterns.fix_template: Remove import statement or fix the imported symbol name
patterns.dreamlink_context: Common during refactoring when imports are added but not used immediately

example.error: error TS2305: 'ProfileType' is not exported from module './profile'
example.fix: Either remove the import or check the actual export name in profile.ts

patterns.description: Variable declared but not referenced in code
patterns.fix_template: Remove variable declaration or prefix with underscore if intentional: const _unused = ...
patterns.dreamlink_context: Occurs when extracting values that end up unused

example.error: error TS6133: 'userId' is declared but never used
example.fix: Remove the variable or rename to _userId if intentionally unused

patterns.description: Accessing non-existent property subscription_tier on profile type
patterns.fix_template: Query subscriptions table instead: const { data: sub } = await supabase.from('subscriptions').select('*').eq('user_id', user.id).single()
patterns.dreamlink_context: Known Dreamlink issue: profile table doesn't have subscription_tier; it's stored in subscriptions table. See CLAUDE.md known issues #4

example.error: error TS2339: Property 'subscription_tier' does not exist on type 'Profile'
example.fix: Replace profile.subscription_tier lookup with subscriptions table query

patterns.description: Using .eq('id', userId) instead of .eq('user_id', userId) in query
patterns.fix_template: Change .eq('id', userId) to .eq('user_id', userId). Many Dreamlink tables use user_id as the user reference.
patterns.dreamlink_context: Common pattern confusion in Dreamlink. Most tables use 'user_id' foreign key, not 'id'

example.error: error TS2345: Argument of type "'id'" is not assignable to parameter
example.fix: Change to .eq('user_id', user.id) to match the actual column name

patterns.description: Function parameter or variable missing type annotation
patterns.fix_template: Add explicit type annotation: (param: string) => or const value: number = ...
patterns.dreamlink_context: Dreamlink requires strict TypeScript mode with explicit types

example.error: error TS7006: Parameter 'dream' implicitly has an 'any' type
example.fix: Add type: function analyzeDream(dream: string) { ... }

patterns.description: Missing await on async function like createServerClient()
patterns.fix_template: Add await: const client = await createServerClient(...)
patterns.dreamlink_context: createServerClient is async and must be awaited. Common mistake in server actions. See CLAUDE.md authentication #1

example.error: error TS2488: Type 'Promise<SupabaseClient>' has no properties
example.fix: Change: const client = createServerClient(...) to: const client = await createServerClient(...)

patterns.description: Direct console.log() in production code
patterns.fix_template: Remove console.log or replace with structured logging: import { logger } from '@/utils/logger'; logger.info(...)
patterns.dreamlink_context: Dreamlink forbids direct console.log in production code. Use structured logging instead. See CLAUDE.md code style

example.error: error no-console: 'console.log' was called
example.fix: Replace with logger.info() or remove if not needed

patterns.description: Promise not awaited or caught
patterns.fix_template: Add await or .catch() handler: await operation() or operation().catch(err => handleError(err))
patterns.dreamlink_context: Async operations must be properly handled to prevent silent failures

example.error: error no-floating-promises: Promises must be awaited, returned, or explicitly marked as ignored
example.fix: Change: fetchData(); to: await fetchData() or return fetchData()

patterns.description: Using max_tokens with reasoning model (should use max_completion_tokens)
patterns.fix_template: Replace max_tokens with max_completion_tokens for gpt-5-nano
patterns.dreamlink_context: gpt-5-nano is a reasoning model that uses max_completion_tokens, not max_tokens. See CLAUDE.md OpenAI model note

example.error: OpenAI API error: Unknown parameter 'max_tokens' for gpt-5-nano
example.fix: Change max_tokens: 2000 to max_completion_tokens: 4000

patterns.description: Setting temperature on reasoning model (not supported)
patterns.fix_template: Remove temperature parameter for gpt-5-nano
patterns.dreamlink_context: Reasoning models don't support custom temperature (always uses 1.0)

example.error: OpenAI API error: Reasoning models don't support temperature parameter
example.fix: Remove: temperature: 0.7 from gpt-5-nano API calls

patterns.description: Using node.js module in edge runtime route
patterns.fix_template: Either remove 'export const runtime = edge' or remove incompatible import
patterns.dreamlink_context: OpenAI routes use Edge Runtime which doesn't support fs, path, etc.

example.error: Module 'fs' not found in edge runtime
example.fix: Remove import fs from 'fs' or move to Node.js runtime (remove runtime='edge')

patterns.description: Using browser client in server context (actions or route handlers)
patterns.fix_template: Use createServerClient in server actions/routes: const client = await createServerClient()
patterns.dreamlink_context: Supabase SSR pattern: browser client for 'use client' components, server client for actions/routes

example.error: createBrowserClient called in server action context
example.fix: Import and use createServerClient from @/utils/supabase/server

patterns.description: Using server client in browser component
patterns.fix_template: Use createBrowserClient in 'use client' components: const supabase = createBrowserClient()
patterns.dreamlink_context: Supabase SSR pattern: server client can only be used in server actions/routes

example.error: createServerClient used in client component
example.fix: Import createBrowserClient from @/utils/supabase/client

patterns.description: Test failing due to RLS policy denying access
patterns.fix_template: Use admin client in tests to bypass RLS: const adminClient = createClient(url, serviceRoleKey)
patterns.dreamlink_context: RLS policies strictly enforced; tests need admin client to insert test data

example.error: Test failed: no rows returned (RLS policy denied access)
example.fix: Use admin client for test data setup

patterns.description: Hydration mismatch in theme provider
patterns.fix_template: Wrap ThemeProvider in Suspense: <Suspense fallback={...}><ThemeProvider>...
patterns.dreamlink_context: next-themes requires proper hydration handling in Next.js

example.error: Hydration mismatch: expected text 'light' but found 'dark'
example.fix: Wrap ThemeProvider in Suspense with loading fallback

patterns.description: Using Framer Motion in server component
patterns.fix_template: Add 'use client' directive to component: 'use client'
patterns.dreamlink_context: Framer Motion requires client-side rendering

example.error: Server component can't use motion components
example.fix: Add 'use client' at top of file

patterns.description: Debug/seed endpoint without authentication guard
patterns.fix_template: Add auth check at start of handler: const user = await getUser(); if (!user || !isAdmin(user)) return new Response('Unauthorized', { status: 401 })
patterns.dreamlink_context: Debug endpoints must never be accessible in production without proper auth guards

example.error: Debug endpoint /api/debug/seed accessible without authentication
example.fix: Add requireAuth middleware or check user permissions

patterns.description: Duplicate/conflicting file will cause import confusion
patterns.fix_template: Consolidate duplicate files: choose one version and delete the other
patterns.dreamlink_context: Duplicate files cause import resolution issues and confusion during development

example.error: File 'providers 2.tsx' conflicts with 'providers.tsx'
example.fix: Review both versions, consolidate changes, delete the duplicate

patterns.description: public/version.json not updated or missing
patterns.fix_template: Run npm run version:update to regenerate version.json
patterns.dreamlink_context: Version file tracks deployment and git commit hash

example.error: version.json not updated in this commit
example.fix: Run: npm run version:update

patterns.description: Zod schema missing field that exists in DB (schema drift)
patterns.fix_template: Add field to Zod schema: fieldName: z.string().nullable() or update migration if field shouldn't exist
patterns.dreamlink_context: Schema drift occurs when migrations add columns but Zod schemas aren't updated

example.error: bible_citations.source column not found in schema
example.fix: Add to bibleCitationSchema: source: z.string().optional()

patterns.description: SQL table exists but no corresponding Zod schema
patterns.fix_template: Create Zod schema for table: Create schema/payments.ts with z.object definition
patterns.dreamlink_context: Known Dreamlink issue: payments table has no Zod schema

example.error: payments table exists in DB but no Zod schema found
example.fix: Create schema/payments.ts with proper Zod schema
